text: Automated scholarship-reminder workflows by building Google Apps Script systems that send targeted emails to students, reducing manual outreach and increasing response rates.
Built a 100+-entry scholarship database with built-in verification logic, enabling accurate tracking and streamlined advising workflows.
Facilitated academic workshops and directed support for course planning and financial aid for first-generation and non-traditional students.
Analyzing 10,000+ California election records in R, building data-processing pipelines to aggregate, filter, and model precinct-level voting patterns.
Applying machine-learning methods to evaluate potential impacts of the California Voting Rights Act across multiple jurisdictions.
Led 4-engineer team to build a Svelte event platform for 1,000+ attendees, delivering real-time schedules and announcements.
Integrated secure Stripe payments to streamline registration and merchandise transactions.
Expanded build mode in Unreal Engine 5, implementing new assets and features resulting in a 73\% increase of new building placements.
Developed and integrated new camera settings, expanding functionality by 75\%.
Collaborated with designers to debug new features, reducing post-deployment issues.
Tutored over 30 peers in core course concepts during weekly lab sessions.
Conducted a targeted review session leading to scores 10\% above class average.
Engineered 15+ custom text features including TF-IDF transformations, character n-grams, and punctuation ratios to capture spam indicators in 8,000+ email datasets.

Implemented and compared Logistic Regression, Decision Trees, and Random Forests using scikit-learn, achieving 96\%+ test accuracy through systematic hyperparameter tuning and k-fold cross-validation.
Built end-to-end ML pipeline predicting home sale prices across 500,000+ records, incorporating 61 features including property characteristics, location data, and temporal variables.
Performed comprehensive feature engineering creating polynomial terms, interaction features, and categorical encodings; applied Ridge and Lasso regularization to handle multicollinearity.
Achieved top-quartile prediction accuracy on held-out test set through systematic model tuning and outlier handling.
Designed complex MongoDB aggregation pipelines using PyMongo to query and transform nested JSON documents from Yelp's academic dataset with variable schemas.
Built document-oriented data models leveraging embedded arrays and references, comparing performance tradeoffs between MongoDB's flexible schema and traditional relational databases.
Performed update operations including upserts and bulk modifications with text indexing across 100,000+ documents.
Engineered ETL pipeline processing 1+ million sensor readings from UC Berkeley buildings, cleaning malformed timestamps, handling missing data, and normalizing measurement units.

Designed normalized relational schema with proper foreign key constraints and indexing strategies, transforming denormalized CSV data into efficient PostgreSQL database structure optimized for billions of rows.
Implemented complex SQL aggregations including window functions and CTEs to compute rolling averages and detect anomalies.
Analyzed query execution plans using EXPLAIN ANALYZE on Lahman's Baseball Database (1871-2020), identifying performance bottlenecks and optimizing slow queries.
Implemented B-tree and hash indexes on high-cardinality columns, reducing query execution time by 10-50x on complex joins across 150+ years of player statistics.
Compared views vs materialized views for frequently-accessed data, benchmarking different query formulations.
Built interactive 3D Gaussian splat painting system by extending Nerfstudio's Viser renderer, implementing real-time color editing tools for large point-cloud scenes with millions of Gaussians.
Developed polyline-based brush-stroke selection algorithm by projecting 3D Gaussian centers into screen space and computing point-to-stroke distances.
Implemented image-based color transfer using Pillow and NumPy, mapping 2D pixel values onto 3D splats through normalized coordinate projection.
Implemented physically-based cloth simulation using spring-mass systems with structural, shearing, and bending constraints; applied Verlet integration for stable numerical solving.
Developed collision detection and response algorithms for self-collisions and object interactions, using spatial hashing to optimize performance for meshes with 10,000+ vertices.
Integrated GLSL shaders for realistic cloth rendering including Blinn-Phong, texture mapping, and environment-mapped reflections.
Built Monte Carlo path tracer implementing ray-primitive intersection tests, BVH acceleration structures, and direct/indirect illumination with importance sampling.
Implemented BSDF materials including diffuse, mirror, glass, and microfacet models using Fresnel reflectance and multiple importance sampling.
Optimized rendering performance through BVH tree construction using surface area heuristic, reducing render times from hours to minutes for scenes with 100K+ triangles.
Implemented AI agents using A* search with custom heuristics, minimax with alpha-beta pruning, and expectimax for adversarial gameplay.
Developed Q-learning and approximate Q-learning agents with feature-based representations, achieving 80\%+ win rates by learning optimal policies through temporal difference updates.
Built probabilistic inference system using Bayes nets and particle filtering for ghost tracking in partially observable environments.

Implemented neural networks from scratch in PyTorch including perceptrons, MLPs, CNNs, RNNs, and attention mechanisms to solve regression, MNIST digit classification, and language identification tasks.
Built complete training pipelines with mini-batch gradient descent, cross-entropy loss, and backpropagation; achieved 97\%+ accuracy on MNIST and 81\%+ on language ID benchmarks.
Optimized model performance through systematic hyperparameter tuning of learning rates, hidden layer sizes, and network depth.
Built secure file-sharing system with end-to-end encryption, user authentication via digital signatures, hierarchical access control with delegation and revocation, resilient to malicious servers.
Implemented hybrid cryptography combining AES-256 symmetric encryption for file data with RSA public-key encryption for key exchange; used HMAC for integrity verification.
Designed secure sharing protocol enabling owners to grant and revoke access efficiently through capability-based security model.
Built discrete-event network simulator in Python implementing distance-vector and link-state routing protocols, analyzing convergence behavior and handling link failures.
Implemented TCP congestion control algorithms (Reno, Tahoe, CUBIC) with slow-start, congestion avoidance, and fast recovery; benchmarked throughput and fairness.
Simulated network topologies with varying bandwidth, latency, and packet loss; measured performance metrics including queue utilization and end-to-end delay.
Analyzed 30+ years of California climate data from NOAA and CalFire using R and Python, investigating correlations between rising temperatures, drought indices, and wildfire frequency.
Built time-series forecasting models using ARIMA and random forests to predict wildfire risk based on meteorological variables.
Created interactive geospatial visualizations with ggplot2 and leaflet mapping temporal trends in fire season length and burned acreage.

Directed team of four to develop an AI tutor website utilizing OpenAI GPT-3; focused on backend architecture including API integration with Node.js, secure user authentication, and Firebase data management.
Managed project version control and collaborated with team members to merge features and resolve conflicts effectively.
Led development of 2D tile-based world generation engine implementing binary space partitioning for random room placement and A* pathfinding algorithm for intelligent NPC navigation.
Designed player interaction system with inventory management and save/load functionality using Java serialization; culminating in 2000+ lines of code and 300 git commits.
Modified Unity C\# codebase using Harmony patching to improve player climbing mechanics by 150\%.
Accumulated over 20,000 user downloads and 64 dependencies from other developers on Thunderstore modding platform.
